arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the custom routing accelerator.

attributes.description: The attributes related to flow logs, including whether they are enabled, the S3 bucket storing them, and the prefix used.

dns_name.description: The DNS name associated with the custom routing accelerator.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the custom routing accelerator is enabled.

hosted_zone_id.description: The ID of the hosted zone that is associated with the accelerator.

id.description: The unique identifier of the custom routing accelerator.

ip_address_type.description: The type of IP addresses used by the accelerator, such as IPv4 or IPv6.

ip_sets.description: A list of IP sets associated with the accelerator, including IP addresses and their family type.

name.description: The name given to the custom routing accelerator.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the custom routing accelerator for organization and identification.
